title: ToolCallTrace
description: One element per tool invocation the Ohanafy Plan agent makes during a copilot call. The canonical TypeScript source is packages/web-app/src/lib/toolCallTrace.ts — keep in sync when SCHEMA_VERSION bumps.

schemaVersion.description: Embedded in every trace. Breaking changes bump this value.

tool.description: snake_case tool name, e.g. apply_events, query_baseline, respond_live.

inputHash.description: Truncated SHA-256 of canonicalized input; for correlation without logging the raw value.

outputTokens.description: LLM output tokens; only set for tools that call an LLM.
